chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 670 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3067/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 26.06.2025 Mr. Abdul Shakoor Bullo, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General along with SIP Ghulam Mustafa of Police Station Sijawal, District Kamber- Shahdadkot..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Additional Prosecutor General files statements / comments of respondents No.2 and 3, which are taken on record. Investigating Officer of the subject crime is present and submits that he has recorded statement of alleged abductee Mst. Saima (Petitioner No.1) under Section 161, Cr.P.C., wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Dilbar Ali (Petitioner No.2) with her own freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere, and they have four children from this wedlock. She has further stated that her father’s cousin, namely Baban Ali (Respondent No.5) has lodged a false FIR bearing Crime No.03 of 2016 at Police Station Sijawal, District Kamber-Shahdadkot regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer, placing on record a copy of the said statement of petitioner No.1, further submits that he will present a copy of the same along with his report before the concerned Judicial Magistrate / Court, who will pass an appropriate order in accordance with law.

She has further stated that her father’s cousin, namely Baban Ali (Respondent No.5) has lodged a false FIR bearing Crime No.03 of 2016 at Police Station Sijawal, District Kamber-Shahdadkot regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer, placing on record a copy of the said statement of petitioner No.1, further submits that he will present a copy of the same along with his report before the concerned Judicial Magistrate / Court, who will pass an appropriate order in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of along with the listed application. However, official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, as and when they require. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
